textByHashes.bf7bead218bb93534943590ec11421af21e1b0db: See! It's not just me who doesn't know what's happening.
textByHashes.f1cf6f82425057e5ac58166d0690675c2af6179a: Why would I be excited about a place I never even knew existed?
textByHashes.cfb86ba5f979005ae92c8a3d198dcb6fd840af1d: Adventure? Sounds dangerous. I'll be staying right here, thank you very much!
textByHashes.16aa6e1c3632c731b558170a27456fad18580548: I don't know... It all sounds a bit odd to me.
textByHashes.fb6c8fc84af23e0b7415ac5d46b22b29cb4a93ac: Hang on... what's going on over there?
textByHashes.f9bbe98d5988f37e3b2245ed191fc89e96505a26: That's an unusually big bag he's carrying.
textByHashes.8953cd68e103c3a3da00076939d3a89a4242e080: That was quite a large bag that guard was carrying. I wonder where he's taking it...
